task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the provided sea trials and physics technical note documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'Sea_Trials_Report_2025.txt' and/or 'Sim_Physics_Tech_Note.txt' open in a text editor or their contents displayed in the terminal.

task_completion.description: Agent updates the ship's Length and Beam in the dynamics.ini file to the correct metric values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing '/opt/bridgecommand/Models/Ship/MV_Gladiator/dynamics.ini' being edited, with 'Length' set to approximately 165.0 and 'Beam' set to approximately 23.0.

task_completion.description: Agent calculates and updates the RudderArea and DragArea in the dynamics.ini file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'dynamics.ini' being edited, with 'RudderArea' set to approximately 455.7 and 'DragArea' set to approximately 16.5.

task_completion.description: Agent updates the Description field in the dynamics.ini file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'dynamics.ini' being edited, with the 'Description' field containing the text 'Calibrated 2025'.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a summary calibration certificate with the applied values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a new file '/home/ga/Documents/calibration_certificate.txt' being created and edited, containing a summary of the newly calculated metric dimensions and area values.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely calculates the required values rather than magically knowing them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent using a calculator app, writing a Python script, or using terminal math tools (like bc or python -c) to compute the conversions and formulas.

integrity.description: Agent actually modifies the target files rather than just printing the expected output to the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of a text editor (nano, vim, gedit) or valid file-writing commands (echo > file, sed -i) targeting the specific file paths.

integrity.description: Agent saves the calibration certificate in the exact requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for file paths in the editor or terminal confirming the certificate is saved to '/home/ga/Documents/calibration_certificate.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file to edit: /opt/bridgecommand/Models/Ship/MV_Gladiator/dynamics.ini. Certificate file to create: /home/ga/Documents/calibration_certificate.txt. Ground truth values to look for in the files (allow ~5% tolerance): Length = 165.0 m, Beam = 23.0 m, RudderArea = 455.7, DragArea = 16.5. The Description field in dynamics.ini must contain 'Calibrated 2025'.
